name: 類型標籤鉤子
description: 頻道描述中直接列出受眾最愛的類型關鍵詞，精準命中短劇核心受眾的口味偏好，降低點擊決策成本。

examples.drama_title: THE ULTIMATE REVENGE MARRIGE: I WED MY FAMILY'S ENEMY! ♟️His Only Rule: "No One Touches My Wife.❤️‍🔥
examples.excerpt: Sweet romance, angst, rebirth, time travel, and more – high-energy updates every day! Plot twists, heart-fluttering moments, non-stop sweetness and no dull moments
